header_3.raw_response: For me, quitting a stable job for a new startup would carry a mix of both discomfort and excitement. However, based on my personality and experiences—particularly my emphasis on stability, financial responsibility, and the importance of a safety net—I would lean more toward the uncomfortable side. I value security and have seen how uncertainty can impact both personal and financial well-being, especially given my family’s background.
